did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results. The study is a prospective clinical validation of Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) for peri-ocular skin cancers, where OCT images were analyzed and scored by researchers based on previously identified OCT features and correlated with histopathology. While the discussion mentions that other groups have created algorithms using deep learning for automated BCC detection (citing reference [32]), this paper itself relies on manual image interpretation and clinical correlation, not computational modeling or AI for result generation.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
